Home / Services / Vlogging & Videography / Corporate & Promo Video

🏢 Corporate & Promo Video

A premium, cinematic video that tells your brand story and showcases your business at its best. Whether it is a company introduction film, a product showcase, a recruitment video, or a promotional piece for your website and social channels, we produce it to broadcast quality. The package includes a full-day shoot with professional cinema camera, lighting rig, and wireless audio, pre-production storyboarding and shot planning, professional editing with motion graphics, text overlays, and branded elements, licensed background music, colour grading to cinematic standards, and delivery in multiple formats (web, social, presentation). We also provide a 30-second cut-down version optimised for social media advertising. This is the video that lives on your homepage, plays at events, and makes clients take you seriously.

Service Details

Category: Vlogging & Videography

Credits Price: 1400 credits (approx. £1750)

Turnaround: 10–18 days

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within 10–18 days
Book Corporate & Promo Video Now

Related Vlogging & Videography Services

  • Social Media Video Pack — Short-form video content pack for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. (300 credits)
  • YouTube Video Production — Full-day YouTube video production including filming, editing, thumbnails, and SEO-optimised descriptions. (800 credits)
  • Monthly Video Retainer — Ongoing monthly video content package: 2 filming days producing 8+ videos for YouTube and social media. (2000 credits)

Why Choose Creative Kaygency for Corporate & Promo Video?

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: 10–18 days
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions
  • Track progress from your personal dashboard
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
